payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it is superseded by mem_new, so it should not be shown as a current fact.

entity_resolution.reason: The query refers to Sam in the Goldman context; recall selected the active matching memory and excluded the superseded version.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was returned for Sam from Goldman because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching the recall query.
mem_old was filtered out because it is marked as superseded by mem_new and should not be presented as current.

details: Explained why mem_old was filtered as superseded.
Did not present the superseded memory as current.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or revise the supersession link.
If mem_new is inaccurate, correct mem_new rather than reactivating mem_old as current.
If both memories describe different Sams or different Goldman contexts, split or disambiguate the entities.

raw_text: {"intent":"debug_explain_recall","decision":"returned mem_new and filtered mem_old","memory_cards":[{"kind":"recall_result","statement":"mem_new was returned for Sam from Goldman because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching the recall query.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"queried entity"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"affiliation/context"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"from","object":"Goldman"}]},{"kind":"filtered_result","statement":"mem_old was filtered out because it is marked as superseded by mem_new and should not be presented as current.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"queried entity"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"affiliation/context"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"mem_old","predicate":"superseded_by","object":"mem_new"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"matched_existing_entity","entity_id":null,"reason":"The query refers to Sam in the Goldman context; recall selected the active matching memory and excluded the superseded version."},"conflict_classification":"supersession","answer":"Recall returned mem_new because it is the active memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it is superseded by mem_new, so it should not be shown as a current fact.","citations":["mem_new"],"repair_options":["If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or revise the supersession link.","If mem_new is inaccurate, correct mem_new rather than reactivating mem_old as current.","If both memories describe different Sams or different Goldman contexts, split or disambiguate the entities."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Explained why mem_new was returned.","Explained why mem_old was filtered as superseded.","Did not present the superseded memory as current."]}}
